_comment: INJECTED VIOLATION: Records with check_id week3-document-refinery-extractions.extracted_facts.confidence.range were produced by running: uv run contracts/runner.py --contract generated_contracts/extractions.yaml --data outputs/week3/extractions.jsonl --mode ENFORCE --inject-violation. The injector scales all extracted_facts[*].confidence values from 0.0-1.0 to 0-100, simulating a producer that changed the confidence scale. See contracts/runner.py inject_confidence_violation() for implementation. The embedding_drift record (violation_id 1e95bddf) is a REAL violation detected on live data, traceable to commit 4d2b4eb4 by gashawbekelek@gmail.com. Known limitations documented in DOMAIN_NOTES.md Known Limitations section.

message: extracted_facts[*].confidence range violation: actual [70.0000, 97.0000]. confidence is in 0–100 range, not 0.0–1.0. Breaking change detected.

registry_subscribers.breaking_reason: Used for lineage node confidence weighting and ranking. Scale change from 0.0–1.0 to 0–100 silently corrupts all threshold checks (e.g., nodes with confidence 87 pass a threshold of 0.5 instead of failing it).
AI extension uses confidence as embedding drift baseline. Scale change invalidates all historical baselines stored in schema_snapshots/baselines.json and triggers false drift alerts.

required_action: Audit all records for out-of-range values and update the producer to enforce the correct scale.
mitigation_steps: Identify the producer that changed the value scale
Roll back or patch the producer to emit values within the contract range
Confirm PASS before merging the fix

known_limitations.drift_score: drift=1.0000 is the cosine distance clamped at ceiling. Root cause: mock embedder (no OPENAI_API_KEY set) generates fresh random unit vectors each run, producing near-orthogonal centroids. Detection and violation record are real. Fix: set OPENAI_API_KEY and run --set-baseline. See DOMAIN_NOTES.md.
known_limitations.blame_target: Blame points to outputs/week3/extractions.jsonl (data file) not src/week3/extractor.py (producer). Lineage traversal stopped at the output file rather than walking upstream to the source. See DOMAIN_NOTES.md.

blame_chain.author: gashawbekelek@gmail.com
blame_chain.commit_message: Complete Week 7 Data Contract Enforcer — all phases implemented

registry_subscribers.breaking_reason: Embedding drift invalidates text-based quality signals and historical drift baselines.
Embedding drift invalidates text-based quality signals and historical drift baselines.

required_action: Re-establish the embedding baseline if the distribution shift is intentional, or revert the extraction model to its prior version.
mitigation_steps: Review extraction model changes in the past 48 hours
If unintended: revert the extraction model to its prior version
Re-run: uv run contracts/ai_extensions.py to verify resolution
